title: Junior Instructional Designer at S.Chand Group Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at S.Chand Group Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About S.Chand Group Capital India:
S.Chand Group Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group Capital India!
